title: "Physics Daily: Quantum Tunneling, AI Discovery, and Space Policy"
date: 2026-06-27T04:31:46.644123+00:00
summary: "Quantum tunneling history, AI-driven material discovery, and international space cooperation"
run_time_ist: "10:01AM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Physics Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 10:01AM</p>

<h2 class="section-title">India Physics</h2>
<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Space Agency Collaboration:</strong> The BRICS Heads of Space Agencies meeting in Bengaluru concluded under India&#x27;s chairmanship, focusing on strengthening international cooperation in space exploration and technology.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuAFBVV95cUxNNXBJR0RWaGFvdmhobXY0V2VPemxqdk9KYXhTTDI5aEdlaTgycnk0bm9Zd3NQV1NOVzR0RzVDbVV4RVIzSHU5Rnh0aVhqbnJVTEgzd1BBM1VJSzkzcHlLMTJDVjJjNWt2NXpDYU1LM1ZsWmh5QzhTNXdyVG1qaFZ4S0tCWTJKLUJnZzBubEVnWmo1RHVQcmg4a3UxWlJSeld0eUxUYVIyai1ON2lfTUczTkVjNXZ5OGZm?oc=5">I2</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Higgs Boson Fundamentals:</strong> A review of the Higgs boson’s discovery highlights its critical role in the Standard Model and how it fundamentally changed our understanding of mass and the universe.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5">I1</a></span></li>
</ul>
<h2 class="section-title">World Physics</h2>
<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Macroscopic Quantum Tunneling:</strong> Historical experiments at UC Berkeley demonstrated that quantum tunneling, typically viewed as a subatomic phenomenon, can occur in macroscopic superconducting circuits.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5">W1</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>AI in Material Science:</strong> The integration of artificial intelligence with quantum computing is accelerating the discovery of novel quantum materials with unique properties.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirAFBVV95cUxOaHhMVjU3R1hiZjZMTzRzTjNzSVVoa3AyVUJRQ05Md3NUUzYzVGFGUy1aTU9xdHlLU3lKdk5nLWZGY1JtcGNrcnlLOVM0SUZtVVhFQzBEaHJwazV0dTFnZS0xWUdXTjk0VDBWdEcwa0t4dzJvSHlTbFVpbU5JamUzMWNtRm55OElwc19oWlZzRDVsTGlZWGJZUVJ5Y3pMdy1EZ3pHc1Z6ZmlmLTVW?oc=5">W2</a></span></li>
</ul>
